items.name: ni5arga/protestchat
items.full_text: Encrypted messaging with no internet, no cell tower, and no server. Phones relay for each other over Bluetooth mesh, so it keeps working during internet shutdowns and inside cellular jammers

items.name: dinosn/fastjson-jsontype-rce-lab
items.full_text: Docker lab + one-payload exploit + defensive scanner for the fastjson 1.2.66-1.2.83 @JSONType remote-class-load RCE (SSRF->defineClass under Spring Boot LaunchedURLClassLoader; autoType OFF; parseObject binding is not a mitigation)
